findings.title: langfuse/langfuse
findings.description: 🪢 Open source LLM engineering platform: LLM Observability, metrics, evals, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23

findings.title: evidentlyai/evidently
findings.description: Evidently is ​​an open-source ML and LLM observability framework. Evaluate, test, and monitor any AI-powered system or data pipeline. From tabular data to Gen AI. 100+ metrics.

findings.title: openlit/openlit
findings.description: Open source platform for AI Engineering: OpenTelemetry-native LLM Observability, GPU Monitoring, Guardrails, Evaluations, Prompt Management, Vault, Playground. 🚀💻 Integrates with 50+ LLM Providers, VectorDBs, Agent Frameworks and GPUs.

findings.title: Scale3-Labs/langtrace
findings.description: Langtrace 🔍 is an open-source,  Open Telemetry based end-to-end observability tool for LLM applications, providing real-time tracing, evaluations and metrics for popular LLMs, LLM frameworks, vectorDBs and more.. Integrate using Typescript, Python. 🚀💻📊

findings.title: TonicAI/tonic_validate
findings.description: Metrics to evaluate the quality of responses of your Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) applications.

findings.title: dsdanielpark/open-llm-leaderboard-report
findings.description: Weekly visualization report of Open LLM model performance based on 4 metrics.

findings.title: ai-evals-course/judgy
findings.description: Python package for estimating a CIs for metrics evaluated by LLM-as-Judges.

findings.title: parea-ai/parea-sdk-py
findings.description: Python SDK for experimenting, testing, evaluating & monitoring LLM-powered applications - Parea AI (YC S23)

findings.title: RouteWorks/RouterArena
findings.description: RouterArena: An open framework for evaluating LLM routers with standardized datasets, metrics, an automated framework, and a live leaderboard.

findings.title: zli12321/qa_metrics
findings.description: An easy python package to run quick basic QA evaluations. This package includes standardized QA evaluation metrics and semantic evaluation metrics: Black-box and Open-Source large language model prompting and evaluation, exact match, F1 Score, PEDANT semantic match, transformer match. Our package also supports prompting OPENAI and Anthropic API.

findings.title: waltonfuture/Diff-eRank
findings.description: [NeurIPS 2024]  A Novel Rank-Based Metric for Evaluating Large Language Models

findings.title: TIGER-AI-Lab/VideoScore2
findings.description: Automatic Metric for Evaluating Generated Videos

findings.title: Yunhao-Feng/BackdoorAgent
findings.description: BackdoorAgent is a stage-aware framework and benchmark that instruments LLM-agent workflows (planning, memory, tools) to systematically inject, track, and evaluate backdoor triggers across multi-step trajectories using unified metrics like ASR and clean accuracy.

findings.title: TIGER-AI-Lab/TIGERScore
findings.description: "TIGERScore: Towards Building Explainable Metric for All Text Generation Tasks" [TMLR 2024]

findings.title: lechmazur/deception
findings.description: Benchmark evaluating LLMs on their ability to create and resist disinformation. Includes comprehensive testing across major models (Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, Llama, etc.) with standardized evaluation metrics.

findings.title: facebookresearch/lss_eval
findings.description: This is a new metric that can be used to evaluate faithfulness of text generated by LLMs. The work behind this repository can be found here

findings.title: meshkovQA/Eval-ai-library
findings.description: Comprehensive AI Model Evaluation Framework with advanced techniques including Temperature-Controlled Verdict Aggregation via Generalized Power Mean. Support for multiple LLM providers and 15+ evaluation metrics for RAG systems and AI agents.

findings.title: loveholidays/eval-kit
findings.description: TypeScript SDK for evaluating content quality using both traditional metrics and LLM-powered evaluation

findings.title: sinanuozdemir/oreilly-evaluating-llms
findings.description: Metrics, Benchmarks, and Practical Tools for Assessing Large Language Models

findings.title: Oncoshot/llm-validation-framework
findings.description: A comprehensive Python framework for evaluating LLM-extracted structured data against ground truth labels. Supports binary classification, scalar values, and list fields with detailed performance metrics, confidence-based evaluation, and statistical uncertainty quantification via non-parametric bootstrap confidence intervals.
